compiled_state.title: Improve assertion diagnostics in RED tests 11-13 of test-ticket-create.sh: || true silently masks JSON parse errors making failures ambiguous
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 0 (BASIC). Test assertions use || true which masks JSON parse errors.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fix: replaced 6 instances of python3 -c ... 2>/dev/null || true with _extract_event_field helper that uses try/except to capture PARSE_ERROR diagnostics instead of silencing them.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
